title: OC2R: Components
description: This is an addon to Open Computers II: Reimagined
body:
Welcome to OC2R Components.  This mod has further upgrades to the components of the OC2R Components.  We will try to maintain all versions that OC2R Components has.  The current 1.20.1.



This mod will make it so that you can have,

- Faster CPUs

- More Storage

- More RAM

- Bigger Floppy disks





We use the following server provider:
![https://serversforyou.com/aff.php?aff=8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5451347b0e999f706728598b171f3129319edcfd.png)
